Located on the project summary screen, the Alternatives feature allows you to perform comparisons of different variations of a building within the same project.

These variations include:

|  |
|  |
| Building and Site |
|  |
|  |
|  |
| Simulation settings | [...] Last Simulation Method

The Last Simulation Method section shows the time at which the last simulation was performed, and the type of simulation that was run.

Jump to Calculate Results 

The Jump to Calculate Results button opens the Calculate Results subsection. It automatically marks the alternative from which it was clicked for calculation.

back to Alternatives top

Section Specific Controls

Templates

The templates section shows which theme is being used and how many templates have been created. Click on the Jump to Template button to navigate to the Templates section of TRACE® 3D Plus. A linked alternative may have templates added but the theme will be the same as that of the first alternative created within the project.

back to Alternatives top

Theme [...] Jump to Subsection 

When this button is used, the section within the alternative from which it was clicked from the project summary screen is entered.

Input Considerations

It may be desirable to compare different weather if a building’s location could impact the cost to operate it.

back to Weather top

Building & Site

The Building & Site section shows a building summary, including the number of rooms, zones, and gross and conditioned floor areas. Click on the Jump to Create Building button to navigate to the Create Building subsection within the Site and Building section of TRACE 3D Plus.

back to Alternatives top

Rooms

results.title: Beyond Hardware-based Trace: Useful Alternatives for Run-Time Analysis - News / Trace - Lauterbach Support
results.content:
# Instrumentation-based Trace

TRACE32 provides two primary features for instrumentation-based trace: LOGGER and FDX trace.

Both LOGGER and FDX are software-based trace methods that require modifications to the target application, which must be instrumented to write trace information into reserved memory. Consequently, sufficient spare RAM on the target system is essential.

LOGGER trace records trace information into a reserved RAM buffer during program execution. Once recording stops, TRACE32 retrieves the data from target memory for display and analysis. The recording length is limited by the buffer size. If the buffer becomes full, the application can either overwrite older entries (FIFO mode) or stop writing new data (Stack mode). [...] Authors list

 Authored by Khaled Jmal
 Category: Trace

Trace is often required for use cases such as function and task run-time analysis. Off-chip trace is generally the preferred approach for such use cases, as it provides detailed and reliable results without requiring any modification to the target application. When off-chip trace is not possible, for example due to limited processor or board capabilities, then on-chip trace can be an alternative. However, on-chip trace allows only very short recording times because of its limited on-chip trace buffer.

Background Information [...] Sample-based profiling (SNOOPer) offers a lightweight alternative when instrumentation is not feasible, delivering a broad overview of runtimes but with reduced accuracy, especially for peak values.

 BenchMark Counters (BMC) can be used on some processors to measure run-times without instrumentation overhead.

In practice, the choice of method depends on the target system’s capabilities and the required level of accuracy. LOGGER and FDX are suitable when precise timing is essential, while sample-based profiling provides a useful fallback for high-level performance insights when instrumentation is not feasible.

# Related Documentation & Files

For further details, please refer to the following documents:

 Application Note for the LOGGER Trace

 Application Note for FDX

results.title: 5 Best Traceroute Alternative Tools | DNSstuff
results.content:
SW network-performance-monitor

My number one pick for companies seeking a traceroute alternative is SolarWinds® Network Performance Monitor. NPM is a general network performance monitoring tool with a wide set of features designed to assist with network troubleshooting and management. Alongside its monitoring, alerting, and reporting tools, it includes a special feature called NetPath™ that is comparable to traceroute. [...] ## Best Traceroute Alternatives

Using a traceroute alternative can help administrators get the benefits of traceroute and additional features supporting faster and more efficient troubleshooting. In many enterprise settings, for example, IT professionals use traceroute alongside several other tools. They have to piece together these tools and work out integrations between them, when in some cases they could be using a more comprehensive network monitoring and troubleshooting solution.

best Traceroute alternative tools

best Traceroute alternative tools

There are a wide variety of network trace tools on the market. Some of them are relatively basic, and others are comprehensive. Below are my top picks for traceroute alternative tools.

SW network-performance-monitor [...] Traceroute has been around for a long time. But despite its longevity and widespread usage, there are other, more modern tools capable of helping you with the same problems traceroute is designed to address. As this guide will show, a good traceroute alternative can provide a more complete picture of the issues facing your network while helping make things easier for IT staff and administrators. My recommended tools are SolarWinds® Network Performance Monitor (NPM) and SolarWinds Engineer’s Toolset™ (ETS).

## What Is Traceroute?

Traceroute is a command used for network troubleshooting. It comes as a command-line tool in Unix systems, and it’s available on Mac OS as a graphical traceroute tool through a network utility. In Windows operating systems, the command is called tracert.

results.title: Image Trace Giving Messy Results? This Free Tool Is 10x Cleaner
results.content:
### Designers Leaving Adobe Entirely

VectoSolve for tracing + Figma or Affinity Designer for editing. This combination gives you a complete vector workflow without any Adobe dependency. If you need a traditional desktop vector editor, CorelDRAW with PowerTRACE is the most complete single-application alternative.

### Designers Leaving Adobe Entirely

## Final Thoughts: The Vectorization Landscape Has Changed

## Final Thoughts: The Vectorization Landscape Has Changed

Five years ago, recommending anything over Illustrator's Image Trace would have been controversial. The alternatives were either too limited, too expensive, or too unreliable. [...] | Alternative Tool | Price | Best For | Platform |
 ---  --- |
| VectoSolve | Free / $9.99 mo | AI-powered fast vectorization | Web (any browser) |
| Inkscape | Free (open source) | Full vector editing + tracing | Windows, Mac, Linux |
| Vectorizer.io | Free / $9.95 mo | Quick online auto-trace | Web |
| CorelDRAW | $30.75/mo | Professional design + PowerTRACE | Windows, Mac |
| Affinity Designer | $69.99 (one-time) | One-time purchase alternative | Windows, Mac, iPad | [...] The good: Extremely easy to use. Upload an image, get a vector. The preview system lets you compare before downloading. Handles simple graphics and logos well.

The not-so-good:- Limited free usage — watermarked outputs on free tier
- Quality drops noticeably on photographic or highly detailed images
- No batch processing on lower tiers
- Fewer output format options than competitors

Best for: Non-designers who need an occasional quick conversion without any learning curve.

### 5. CorelDRAW PowerTRACE — Best Illustrator-Like Full Suite Alternative

### 5. CorelDRAW PowerTRACE — Best Illustrator-Like Full Suite Alternative

What it is: The bitmap tracing feature built into CorelDRAW Graphics Suite, Illustrator's main competitor in the professional vector design space.

# Best TraceLink Alternatives: Top Vendors for L4 Pharma Serialization in 2026

## 

## Why Are Companies Looking for a TraceLink Alternative?

If you’re evaluating TraceLink alternatives for pharma serialization, here are the top 9 options. TraceLink is a major player in pharmaceutical serialization and track and trace solutions, with a powerful, unmatched network. TraceLink remains a popular choice. However, several other solution providers are gaining visibility in 2026 and deserve to be considered as alternative platforms.
